object_a.label: door
object_a.description: interior doorway leading to another room/hall
object_a.long_form_open_description: Standard interior door opening on the left wall leading into a hallway or adjoining room; white trim and doorframe contrast with beige wall paint. There is visible trim and a partial view of the adjacent room's wall art.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: Located to the right of the left console and before the long central corridor toward the kitchen

object_b.label: door
object_b.description: open interior doorway leading to another room/hall
object_b.long_form_open_description: Standard interior doorway in the left third, shows a view into an adjacent room or hallway; white trim and an open passage with visible shelving and decor inside the next room; door frame flush with wall.
object_b.location_relative_to_other_objects: slightly right of the wall clock, left of the kitchen island
